findings.title: Inline telemetry flush duplicated verbatim in pr/status.ts instead of using shared helper
findings.suggested_remediation: Replace the inline success/error flush blocks in pr/status.ts with calls to flushTelemetrySuccess and flushTelemetryError from cli/utils/telemetryLifecycle, matching the pattern used in pr/create.ts, pr/reviewers.ts, and pr/disable-auto-merge.ts.

findings.title: Execution engine setup duplicated verbatim between start.ts and resume.ts
findings.suggested_remediation: Extract a shared buildAndValidateExecutionEngine helper (or extend buildExecutionStrategies) into a shared module (e.g., src/cli/utils/executionEngine.ts) that accepts runDir, mergedConfig, telemetry, and logger, and returns both the engine instance and validated strategies. Both start.ts and resume.ts call this helper.

findings.title: PR command feature-ID validation preamble duplicated across four PR subcommands
findings.suggested_remediation: Add a resolveFeatureAndPRContext helper to src/cli/pr/shared.ts that performs the settings resolution, feature ID selection, validation errors, and loadPRContext call, returning the context. All four commands call this helper.

findings.title: Feature-not-found guard pattern repeated in every command that selects a feature
findings.suggested_remediation: Add a requireFeatureId helper to src/cli/utils/runDirectory.ts that wraps selectFeatureId with these two guards and throws/calls this.error appropriately. Commands call requireFeatureId instead of selectFeatureId + manual guards.

findings.title: Oclif error re-throw guard copy-pasted in every command catch block
findings.suggested_remediation: Export a rethrowIfOclifError(error: unknown): void function from src/cli/utils/cliErrors.ts. All command catch blocks call this at the top, then proceed with their specific error handling.

findings.title: Inline telemetry variable declarations duplicated across eight command files
findings.suggested_remediation: Consider a createCommandTelemetry() factory function that returns { logger, metrics, traceManager, commandSpan, runDirPath, startTime } as a mutable container. Commands would call this once and mutate its fields rather than declaring individual variables.

findings.title: Research coordinator initialization block duplicated across three call sites
findings.suggested_remediation: Add a createCoordinatorForRun(runDir, featureId, logger, metrics) convenience factory in researchCoordinator.ts that defaults repoRoot to process.cwd(). All three call sites use this factory.

findings.title: Error instanceof check before logging pattern duplicated across data.ts and resume.ts
findings.description:
The pattern of checking error instanceof Error before extracting message and stack for logging appears in many places across the codebase. In status/data.ts alone it appears at least 10 times:

--- code begin (reference only) ---
error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error',
stack: error instanceof Error ? error.stack : undefined,
--- code end ---

The same pattern appears in resume.ts catch block, telemetryLifecycle.ts, and numerous other files. The serializeError utility in src/utils/errors.ts already does this work but is not used at these sites.
findings.suggested_remediation: Replace the inline error instanceof Error ternary patterns with calls to serializeError from src/utils/errors.ts, which already produces { name, message, stack, ... } in a consistent form. Logger calls become: logger.warn('msg', { ...serializeError(error), error_code: '...' }).

findings.title: Doctor command success metrics block duplicated instead of using flushTelemetrySuccess
findings.suggested_remediation: Replace the inline success flush block in doctor.ts with a call to flushTelemetrySuccess, passing the non-zero exitCode as context. Note: the success helper uses exit_code '0' but doctor can succeed with exit_code != 0 (when warnings exist), so the helper may need an optional exitCode parameter or the attribution remains manual.

findings.title: config not initialized error message duplicated across start.ts and approve.ts
findings.suggested_remediation: Add a requireConfig(settings) guard helper to src/cli/utils/runDirectory.ts that throws a CliError with the derived message if settings.config is absent or errors are present.

findings.title: GitHub and Linear rate-limit blocker construction duplicated in resume.ts
findings.suggested_remediation: Replace the two identical provider-blocker if-blocks with a single loop: for (const providerName of ['github', 'linear']) { ... } using a typed key access. Or extract an appendIntegrationBlockers(integrationBlockers, providerName, providerData) helper.

findings.title: DAG metadata payload construction duplicated between plan.ts and status/data.ts
findings.suggested_remediation: Extract a buildDagMetadata(dag: PlanSummary['dag']) function into taskPlanner.ts or a shared plan utilities module. Both plan.ts and status/data.ts call this function.

findings.title: GitHub and Linear integration status loading duplicated in status/data.ts loadIntegrationsStatus
findings.suggested_remediation: Extract a buildProviderRateLimitStatus(providerReport, providerName) helper that returns the { rate_limit, warnings } sub-object. Call it for both github and linear. The additional PR/issue metadata loading remains provider-specific.

findings.title: Repeated string literal 'Repository not initialized. Run "codepipe init" first.' across multiple files
findings.suggested_remediation: Define ERROR_MESSAGES.REPO_NOT_INITIALIZED = 'Repository not initialized. Run "codepipe init" first.' in src/cli/utils/cliErrors.ts and reference it in all call sites.

findings.title: Reviewer list parsing logic duplicated between pr/create.ts and pr/reviewers.ts
findings.suggested_remediation: Add a parseReviewerList(input: string): string[] helper to src/cli/pr/shared.ts. Both commands call parseReviewerList(typedFlags.reviewers) / parseReviewerList(typedFlags.add).

findings.title: Repeated validation-load error guard pattern (non-ENOENT check) in status/data.ts
findings.suggested_remediation: Extract a logIfUnexpectedFileError(error: unknown, logger: DataLogger | undefined, context: LogContext) helper locally in data.ts that performs the ENOENT guard and logs. All catch blocks in the file call this helper.

findings.title: getGitUser() execSync pattern duplicated in approve.ts and start helpers
findings.suggested_remediation: Move getGitUser() to src/cli/startHelpers.ts (or a new src/cli/utils/gitUtils.ts) as an exported function. Import it in approve.ts.
